text: We saw for loops in the last video We had a lot of fun using for loops And we saw how a for loop makes things very easy And along with for loop we saw how we can print multiplication tables Now we will see how the same thing can be done in while loop And why are while loops made in the language? Why did they put it in Python programming? We introduced while loops in Python programming so that the programmer's time is saved. How? Let's go to the computer screen and I will tell you So now we are going to talk about while loop in Python How can we use while loop? First of all, I will tell you that whether you use while loop or for loop you have to be able to do both But sometimes while loop syntax is convenient for us in some cases and sometimes for loop syntax is convenient In the syntax of for loop, we saw that we write for i in range of i in range of i in range of that we write for i in range and if I write 3 here and I will print i here then the simple thing is that I will get 0, 1, 2 as you all know If I do the same thing with the help of while loop then what I will do is first of all make a variable then I will write while i is less than 3 and after this I will print i and after that I will increment the value of i Let me explain what I did See what I did here I gave a condition in while I said that make i's value 0 After that what I did I said while, that is till i's value is less than 3 till then what I will do I will print i and in every iteration I will increase the value of i So once 0 will be printed then after that i's value will be 1 then 1 will be printed then i's value will be 2 then i's value will be 3 but as i's value will increase and this loop will keep on executing, this condition will be checked in every iteration Now I will explain you how this works i's value is 0, first of all it will come here in line number 5 it will ask whether this condition is getting satisfied or not because if it is not getting satisfied then we will not want to execute anything inside it Ok, it will be executed because this condition is true 0 is less than 3 is true so the answer is yes that yes, this condition is true print i means print 0 0 will be printed here after that i's equal to i plus 1 i's value will be 1 it will go here again, is 1 less than 3 yes it is, so it will print 1, i's value will be 2 is 2 less than 3, yes it is it will print 2, i's value will be 3, is 3 less than 3 No, it is not because 3 less than 3 is not true, so you see here, i's value will not be printed, inside it the masala will not be executed and it will come out of the loop and I will write here done with the loop now I will remove this for loop if I run this then 0, 1 and 2 will work but if I make it i's less than equal to 3 you also keep in mind 3 is less than equal to 3 is true if we talk about 3 is less than equal to 3 then it is true because less than or equal to means either less or equal so if we talk about 3 i's equal to 3, then this condition is satisfied 3 is less than equal to 3 so while 3 is less than equal to 3 print will be here 3, so that's why here instead of 0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 2, 3 will be printed if I put less than equal to so you see here 0, 1, 2, 3 is printed, so this way while loop works, ideally we do not use while loop with numbers but with complex conditions ok, like I will tell you that suppose user gave an input suppose user gave an input so I will write here int input, I told you that we int input, enter the number, we can take something like this user's input as an integer this is important as an integer I will say while i is less than equal to 3, you keep taking input from user so I will put this in loop I will say keep taking input from user till I will increase this number, keep putting smaller number from 38 and keep printing and from here I will remove i is equal to i plus 1 so what is this loop doing? it is saying that keep taking input from user till when? till i is less than equal to 38 so I will run this program as soon as I run it here it is saying i is not defined, what kind of joke is this? ok, so I will do one thing I will have to take an initial value of i from user, so I will take value of i before running while loop now see I took value of i from user I said tell me what is i, so first this line will run and I will be asked value of i, suppose I told 8, now because 8 is less than equal to 38, it will ask me again and print 8 this time or suppose I print 9, it will print 9 9 enter, so see it printed 9 and asked me again suppose I write 34, it asked me again suppose I write 38 38 is actually less than equal to 38 so it will keep running in loop these two lines will keep getting executed till when? till i is less than equal to 38 and the moment the value of i becomes greater than 38, means this condition is not being executed, if it is not then it will come out of loop done with the loop, it will finish the work, ok, so I if I made value of i 98, so 98 was printed, condition was checked, condition was false, this was printed and the program is over I hope you understood this, now see here I have written as the name suggests while loop executes statements while the condition is true, till the condition is true, while loop will keep getting executed as soon as the condition becomes false, the interpreter comes out of the loop, interpreter means python which is executing, what is interpreter means? which is executing our program, which is the control of our program whenever I say interpreter, it means that what will interpreter do? it will come out ok, means the control will come out and if this condition is true then it will keep running in this loop I say interpreter, I say control means I say program control it is the same thing, you are understanding what I am saying ok, now this is the program, you can run here I have given a very simple example of a decrementing loop ok, now this is also important let me comment this out, this is also very important, this is a decrementing loop a decrementing while loop, what is happening? count value is 5 and condition is saying that count should be greater than 0 so if I decrease the value of count in the loop then at one time this condition will become false because at one time the value of count will become 0 while running, so this is reverse loop, reverse while loop decrementing while loop, first 5 will be printed then 4, 3, 2, 1, if I explain this execution to you then listen count value was 5, this condition was true because 5 is greater than 0 print count, print became 5 then count is equal to count minus, count value became 4, condition will be checked again because it is in the while loop, is 4 greater than 0? yes, 4 will be printed again value will become 3 because of this line then 3 will be checked, 3 will be printed then 2 will be printed, then 1 will be printed, so on, at one time value will become 0, is 0 greater than 0? no, absolutely not, so this condition will become false and the program will exit out of the loop, okay? I hope everyone understood this here the count variable is set to 5, this is what I have explained to you, which decrements after each iteration, iteration means whenever it enters the loop, it becomes an iteration it went in the loop once, condition checked it went in the loop, one iteration, again condition checked, it went in the loop, second iteration okay, this is the meaning of iteration depending upon the while loop condition we need to either increment or decrement the counter variable, okay? now we need to decrement or increase it according to our program if we make a mistake in the while loop like suppose I made a mistake count is equal to count plus 1 this will become an infinite loop should I show you? see this is an infinite loop and it will keep on printing the value, are you understanding? means first it will do 5, then 6 7, 8, 9, 10 it will keep on doing, it will keep on doing you are seeing, till I cancel it it will not stop are you seeing? I have to cancel it and I will delete it then it will cancel and in this I have run an infinite while loop how can I cancel it? I think I can close this console and do this, oh god I can stop the program, okay there was an option of stop it didn't stop, why did this happen? stop it, okay it stopped now my, oh I have run it again, I have run it again I will fix it I will fix it, I will stop it, sorry replate people, I am taking so much of your compute infinite loop has run, let me tell you an incident, what happened that on my laptop, a lot of ants came, it was during college time a lot of ants came inside the laptop what I did, I ran an infinite while loop I was in java programming language but the thing was the same and my laptop's fans started spinning so fast, it felt like it will fly away and ants also ran away, my work is done so while loop can be useful in other things so here I run it so this time it will print 5, 4, 3, 2, 1 now with while loop else can be used, and else is used in this way that if it didn't go inside while loop, then it will go inside else now I will write print I am inside else okay, count value is 5 I will tell you how it works it will run, and finally when this condition will be false then it will print I am inside else so it is a very simple thing see here how to use else with while loop you can even use the else statement with the while loop, essentially what the else statement does is that as soon as the while loop condition becomes false, interpreter comes out of the while loop and the else statement is executed, okay, as soon as it will come out of the while loop else will be executed okay, I hope you understood that whenever this condition, I mean whenever it couldn't go inside while loop due to wrong condition it will execute else, it is a simple thing okay, now if I count is equal to minus 5 then what else will be executed, you tell me in the comment will it be executed or not, you have to tell I hope you all guessed that it will be executed, okay now see here, I am inside else will be printed, okay, so it is a very simple thing now, I want to
